revision.text: #redirect[[en:Nishinasuno_Onsen]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

'''西那須野温泉'''(にしなすのおんせん）は[[栃木県]][[那須塩原市]]にある[[温泉]]である。[[西那須野駅]]北西3.7㎞に所在する。'''大鷹の湯'''<ref>{{Cite web |title=西那須温泉 - 温泉の歴史ジャパン |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}}</ref>、'''杜の湯'''<ref name=":0">{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル公式サイト｜客室の他、レストラン、温泉を完備した新スタイルのビジネスホテル |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}</ref>の2つの源泉が用いられている。
{{日本の温泉地|名称=西那須野温泉(大鷹の湯・杜の湯)|所在地=栃木県那須塩原市井口|特記事項=[[那須温泉郷]]には属さない。|交通=[[東北自動車道]][[西那須野塩原インターチェンジ|西那須野塩原IC]]から道程3.2㎞|宿泊施設数=2|泉質=*ナトリウム－塩化物.炭酸水素塩泉（弱アルカリ性低張性高温泉） *単純温泉(低張性弱アルカリ性高温泉)|湧出量=不明}}
== 概要 ==
=== 大鷹の湯 === 「大鷹の湯」は[[1983年]]に開削された比較的新しい温泉<ref group="注">以前から[[那須|那須地方]]は温泉地として有名だったが、主要温泉地である[[塩原温泉郷|塩原]]、[[那須温泉郷|那須湯本]]、[[馬頭温泉郷|馬頭]]はいずれも主要駅やインターチェンジから遠く不便な立地だった。</ref>。[[1994年]]に所有者が宿泊施設「大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター」<ref>{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}</ref>を開業した。[[筋肉痛]]、[[筋肉痛]]、[[関節痛]]、[[五十肩]]、[[運動麻痺]]などに効能がある<ref name=":1">{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=大鷹の湯 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}</ref>。又[[重金属|重金属類]]が検出されない稀有な温泉であり、[[酸化還元電位]]の低さも日本トップレベルとされる<ref>{{Cite web |title=古代ソマチッド温泉との出逢い – 天下泰平 |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=tenkataihei.com |access-date=2024-06-24}}</ref>。
=== 杜の湯 === 「杜の湯」は[[2018年]]に「那須マロニエホテル」<ref>{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}</ref>のオープンに合わせ開削された。全国的に珍しい[[モール泉]]であり、また炭酸水イオンの多さから「美人の湯」を謳っているほか、「大鷹の湯」と同じ病にも効能がある<ref name=":0" />。
== 施設 == [[温泉街]]は前述の宿泊施設2軒のみである。また「大鷹の湯」は大人800円(平日)、「杜の湯」は大人600円で[[日帰り入浴施設|立ち寄り湯]]が可能である<ref name=":1" /><ref name=":0" />。
== アクセス == [[西那須野駅]]・[[那須塩原駅]]から那須塩原市営バス「ゆーバス」西那須野線で「井口北」(大鷹の湯)または「国際医療福祉大学病院」(マロニエホテル)下車<ref>{{Cite web |title=バスルート - 全国バス停・路線マップ |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}</ref>。
== 関連項目 ==
* [[日本の温泉地一覧]] * [[千本松牧場]](近隣の温泉施設)
== 注釈 == <references /> <references group="注" />

単純温泉（低張性弱アルカリ性高温泉） |泉温 = |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = [[那須温泉郷]]には属さない。 }} '''西那須野温泉'''（にしなすのおんせん）は、[[栃木県]][[那須塩原市]]にある[[温泉]]である。[[西那須野駅]]北西3.7㎞に所在する。'''大鷹の湯'''{{Cite web |title=西那須温泉 - 温泉の歴史ジャパン |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}}、'''杜の湯'''の2つの源泉が用いられている{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル公式サイト｜客室の他、レストラン、温泉を完備した新スタイルのビジネスホテル |website=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。[[筋肉痛]]、[[筋肉痛]]、[[関節痛]]、[[五十肩]]、[[運動麻痺]]などに効能がある{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=大鷹の湯 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}。又[[重金属|重金属類]]が検出されない稀有な温泉であり、[[酸化還元電位]]の低さも日本トップレベルとされる{{Cite web |title=古代ソマチッド温泉との出逢い – 天下泰平 |website=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。全国的に珍しい[[モール泉]]であり、また炭酸水イオンの多さから「美人の湯」を謳っているほか、「大鷹の湯」と同じ病にも効能がある。 == 施設 == |title=那須マロニエホテル公式サイト｜客室の他、レストラン、温泉を完備した新スタイルのビジネスホテル |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}の2つの源泉が用いられている。 == 概要 == === 大鷹の湯 === 「大鷹の湯」は[[1983年]]に開削された比較的新しい温泉以前から[[那須|那須地方]]は温泉地として有名だったが、主要温泉地である[[塩原温泉郷|塩原]]、[[那須温泉郷|那須湯本]]、[[馬頭温泉郷|馬頭]]はいずれも主要駅やインターチェンジから遠く不便な立地だった。。[[1994年]]に所有者が宿泊施設「大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター」を開業{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。[[筋肉痛]]、[[筋肉痛]]、[[関節痛]]、[[五十肩]]、[[運動麻痺]]などに効能がある{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=大鷹の湯 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}。又[[重金属|重金属類]]が検出されない稀有な温泉であり、[[酸化還元電位]]の低さも日本トップレベルとされる{{Cite web |title=古代ソマチッド温泉との出逢い – 天下泰平 |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=tenkataihei.com |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 === 杜の湯 === 「杜の湯」は[[2018年]]に「那須マロニエホテル」のオープンに合わせ開削された{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。全国的に珍しい[[モール泉]]であり、また炭酸水イオンの多さから「美人の湯」を謳っているほか、「大鷹の湯」と同じ病にも効能がある。 == 施設 == [[温泉街]]は前述の宿泊施設2軒のみである。また「大鷹の湯」は大人800円（平日）、「杜の湯」は大人600円で[[日帰り入浴|立ち寄り湯]]が可能である。 == アクセス == [[西那須野駅]]・[[那須塩原駅]]から那須塩原市営バス「ゆーバス」西那須野線で「井口北」(大鷹の湯)または「国際医療福祉大学病院」(マロニエホテル)下車{{Cite web |title=バスルート - 全国バス停・路線マップ |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 == 関連項目 == * [[日本の温泉地一覧]] * [[千本松牧場]]（近隣の温泉施設） == 注釈 == {{DEFAULTSORT:にしなすのおんせん}} [[Category:栃木県の温泉]] |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。[[筋肉痛]]、[[関節痛]]、[[五十肩]]、[[運動麻痺]]などに効能がある{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=大鷹の湯 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}。又[[重金属|重金属類]]が検出されない稀有な温泉であり、[[酸化還元電位]]の低さも日本トップレベルとされる{{Cite web |title=古代ソマチッド温泉との出逢い – 天下泰平 |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=tenkataihei.com |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 === 杜の湯 === 「杜の湯」は[[2018年]]に「那須マロニエホテル」のオープンに合わせ開削された{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。全国的に珍しい[[モール泉]]であり、また炭酸水イオンの多さから「美人の湯」を謳っているほか、「大鷹の湯」と同じ病にも効能がある。 == 施設 == [[温泉街]]は前述の宿泊施設2軒のみである。また大鷹の湯は大人800円（平日）、マロニエホテルは大人600円で[[日帰り入浴|立ち寄り湯]]が可能である。 == アクセス == [[西那須野駅]]・[[那須塩原駅]]から[[那須塩原市営バス#西那須野線|「ゆーバス」西那須野線]]で「井口北」(大鷹の湯)または「[[国際医療福祉大学]]病院前」(マロニエホテル)下車{{Cite web |title=バスルート - 全国バス停・路線マップ |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 == 関連項目 == * [[日本の温泉地一覧]] * [[千本松牧場]]（近隣の温泉施設） == 注釈 == {{DEFAULTSORT:にしなすのおんせん}} [[Category:栃木県の温泉]] [[Category:日本の温泉地]] [[Category:那須塩原市の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:那須塩原市の地理]]

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 西那須野温泉 |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント =周辺の航空写真。中央やや上にあるのが大鷹の湯、中央やや左下にあるのがマロニエホテル。 |所在地 = 栃木県那須塩原市井口548-350(大鷹の湯) 栃木県那須塩原市井口546-1(杜の湯) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = [[東北自動車道]][[西那須野塩原インターチェンジ|西那須野塩原IC]]から道程3.2㎞ |泉質 = 大鷹の湯:ナトリウム塩化物 炭酸水素塩泉（弱アルカリ性低張性高温泉）
杜の湯:単純温泉（低張性弱アルカリ性高温泉） |泉温 =約40℃ |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = [[那須温泉郷]]・[[塩原温泉郷]]には属さない。 }} '''西那須野温泉'''（にしなすのおんせん）とは、[[栃木県]][[那須塩原市]]にある[[温泉]]である。[[西那須野駅]]北西3.7㎞に所在する。'''大鷹の湯'''{{Cite web |title=西那須温泉 - 温泉の歴史ジャパン |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}}、'''杜の湯'''{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル公式サイト｜客室の他、レストラン、温泉を完備した新スタイルのビジネスホテル |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}の2つの源泉が用いられている。 == 概要 == === 大鷹の湯 |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=大鷹の湯 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}。又[[重金属|重金属類]]が検出されない稀有な温泉であり、[[酸化還元電位]]の低さも日本トップレベルとされる{{Cite web |title=古代ソマチッド温泉との出逢い – 天下泰平 |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=tenkataihei.com |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 === 杜の湯 === 「杜の湯」は[[2018年]]に「那須マロニエホテル」のオープンに合わせ開削された{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ === 「大鷹の湯」は[[1983年]]に開削された比較的新しい温泉以前から[[那須|那須地方]]は温泉地として有名だったが、主要温泉地である[[塩原温泉郷|塩原]]、[[那須温泉郷|那須湯本]]、[[馬頭温泉郷|馬頭]]はいずれも主要駅やインターチェンジから遠く不便な立地だった。。[[1994年]]に所有者が宿泊施設「大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター」を開業{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。[[筋肉痛]]、[[関節痛]]、[[五十肩]]、[[運動麻痺]]などに効能がある{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=大鷹の湯 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}。又[[重金属|重金属類]]が検出されない稀有な温泉であり、[[酸化還元電位]]の低さも日本トップレベルとされる{{Cite web |title=古代ソマチッド温泉との出逢い – 天下泰平 |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=tenkataihei.com |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 === 杜の湯 === 「杜の湯」は[[2018年]]に「那須マロニエホテル」のオープンに合わせ開削された{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。全国的に珍しい[[モール泉]]であり、また炭酸水イオンの多さから「美人の湯」を謳っているほか、「大鷹の湯」と同じ病にも効能がある。 == 施設 == [[温泉街]]は前述の宿泊施設2軒のみである。また大鷹の湯は大人800円（平日）、マロニエホテルは大人600円で[[日帰り入浴|立ち寄り湯]]が可能である。 == アクセス == [[西那須野駅]]・[[那須塩原駅]]から[[那須塩原市営バス#西那須野線|「ゆーバス」西那須野線]]で「井口北」(大鷹の湯)または「[[国際医療福祉大学病院|国際医療福祉大学病院前]]」(マロニエホテル)下車{{Cite web |title=バスルート - 全国バス停・路線マップ |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[日本の温泉地一覧]] * [[千本松牧場]]（近隣の温泉施設） {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}}{{DEFAULTSORT:にしなすのおんせん}} [[Category:栃木県の温泉]] [[Category:日本の温泉地]] [[Category:那須塩原市の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:那須塩原市の地理]]

revision.text:
{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Chloride spring|ja|塩化物泉}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nnnnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:newer pages]][[ja:西那須野温泉]]

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen

The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Chloride spring|ja|塩化物泉}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. {{日本の温泉地 |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Chloride spring|ja|塩化物泉}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nnnnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:dardar]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nnnnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:original pages]] [[category:most recent 500]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:kk]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:kk]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Chloride spring|ja|塩化物泉}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:kk]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:kk]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Chloride spring|ja|塩化物泉}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[ja:西那須野温泉]]

Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

revision.text:
{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Chloride spring|ja|塩化物泉}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Chloride spring|ja|塩化物泉}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Nishinasuno Onsen-qq]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]]
