Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983rd year|12=draft}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷|12=draft}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year|12=draft}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|12=draft}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|12=draft}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|12=draft}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|12=draft}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|12=draft}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|12=draft}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year|12=draft}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring|12=draft}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|12=draft}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|12=draft}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|12=draft}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|12=draft}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|12=draft}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|12=draft}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|12=draft}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nishinasuno Onsen}}

In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|12=draft|12=draft}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|12=draft|12=draft}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|12=draft|12=draft}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year|12=draft|12=draft}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|12=draft|12=draft}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|12=draft|12=draft}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|12=draft|12=draft}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|12=draft|12=draft}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|12=draft|12=draft}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nishinasuno Onsen}}

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 西那須野温泉 |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント =周辺の航空写真。中央やや上にあるのが大鷹の湯、中央やや左下にあるのがマロニエホテル。 |所在地 = 栃木県那須塩原市井口548-350(大鷹の湯) 栃木県那須塩原市井口546-1(杜の湯) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = [[東北自動車道]][[西那須野塩原IC]]から道程3.2㎞ |泉質 = 大鷹の湯:ナトリウム塩化物 炭酸水素塩泉
杜の湯:単純温泉 |泉温 =約40℃(いずれも高温泉) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 =いずれも弱アルカリ性 |浸透圧の分類 =いずれも低張性 |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = [[那須温泉郷]]・[[塩原温泉郷]]には属さない。 }} '''西那須野温泉'''（にしなすのおんせん）とは、[[栃木県]][[那須塩原市]]にある[[温泉]]である。[[西那須野駅]]北西3.7㎞に所在する。'''大鷹の湯'''{{Cite web |title=西那須温泉 - 温泉の歴史ジャパン |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}}、'''杜の湯'''{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル公式サイト｜客室の他、レストラン、温泉を完備した新スタイルのビジネスホテル |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}の2つの源泉が用いられている。 == 概要 == === 大鷹の湯 === 「大鷹の湯」は[[1983年]]に開削された比較的新しい温泉以前から[[那須|那須地方]]は温泉地として有名だったが、主要温泉地である[[塩原温泉郷|塩原]]、[[那須温泉郷|那須湯本]]、[[馬頭温泉郷|馬頭]]はいずれも主要駅やインターチェンジから遠く不便な立地だった。。[[1994年]]に所有者が宿泊施設「大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター」を開業{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。[[筋肉痛]]、[[関節痛]]、[[五十肩]]、[[運動麻痺]]などに効能がある{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=大鷹の湯 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}。又[[重金属|重金属類]]が検出されない稀有な温泉であり、[[酸化還元電位]]の低さも日本トップレベルとされる{{Cite web |title=古代ソマチッド温泉との出逢い – 天下泰平 |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=tenkataihei.com |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 === 杜の湯 === 「杜の湯」は[[2018年]]に「那須マロニエホテル」のオープンに合わせ開削された{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。全国的に珍しい[[モール泉]]であり、また炭酸水イオンの多さから「美人の湯」を謳っているほか、「大鷹の湯」と同じ病にも効能がある。 == 施設 == [[温泉街]]は前述の宿泊施設2軒のみである。また大鷹の湯は大人800円（平日）、マロニエホテルは大人600円で[[日帰り入浴|立ち寄り湯]]が可能である。 == アクセス == [[西那須野駅]]・[[那須塩原駅]]から[[那須塩原市営バス#西那須野線|「ゆーバス」西那須野線]]で「井口北」（大鷹の湯）または「[[国際医療福祉大学病院|国際医療福祉大学病院前]]」（マロニエホテル）下車{{Cite web |title=バスルート - 全国バス停・路線マップ |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[日本の温泉地一覧]] * [[千本松牧場]]（近隣の温泉施設） {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}}{{DEFAULTSORT:にしなすのおんせん}} [[Category:栃木県の温泉]] [[Category:日本の温泉地]] [[Category:那須塩原市の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:那須塩原市の地理]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "外部リンク" to "External links"
revision.text:
{{infobox Onsen |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |image = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC|12=draft|12=draft}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Brine spring|ja|塩化物泉|1=Brine spring|1=Brine spring|12=draft|12=draft}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉|1=Bicarbonate springs|12=draft|12=draft}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=draft|12=draft}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |External links = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|12=draft|12=draft}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉|1=Onsen|1=Onsen|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983rd year|12=draft|12=draft}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本|12=draft|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷|12=draft|12=draft}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|12=draft|12=draft}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|12=draft|12=draft}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|12=draft|12=draft}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year|12=draft|12=draft}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|12=draft|12=draft}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|12=draft|12=draft}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|12=draft|12=draft}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|12=draft|12=draft}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|12=draft|12=draft}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nishinasuno Onsen}}

It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983rd year}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nishinasuno Onsen}}

Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |External links = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉|1=Onsen|1=Onsen}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. revision.comment: 11 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:西那須野温泉 up to rev 104592540
revision.text:
{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 西那須野温泉 |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント =周辺の航空写真。中央やや上にあるのが大鷹の湯、中央やや左下にあるのがマロニエホテル。 |所在地 = 栃木県那須塩原市井口548-350(大鷹の湯) 栃木県那須塩原市井口546-1(杜の湯) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = [[東北自動車道]][[西那須野塩原IC]]から道程3.2㎞ |泉質 = 大鷹の湯:ナトリウム塩化物 炭酸水素塩泉
杜の湯:単純温泉 |泉温 =約40℃(いずれも高温泉) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 =いずれも弱アルカリ性 |浸透圧の分類 =いずれも低張性 |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = [[那須温泉郷]]・[[塩原温泉郷]]には属さない。 }} '''西那須野温泉'''（にしなすのおんせん）とは、[[栃木県]][[那須塩原市]]にある[[温泉]]である。[[西那須野駅]]北西3.7㎞に所在する。'''大鷹の湯'''{{Cite web |title=西那須温泉 - 温泉の歴史ジャパン |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}}、'''杜の湯'''{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル公式サイト｜客室の他、レストラン、温泉を完備した新スタイルのビジネスホテル |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}の2つの源泉が用いられている。 == 概要 == === 大鷹の湯 === 「大鷹の湯」は[[1983年]]に開削された比較的新しい温泉以前から[[那須|那須地方]]は温泉地として有名だったが、主要温泉地である[[塩原温泉郷|塩原]]、[[那須温泉郷|那須湯本]]、[[馬頭温泉郷|馬頭]]はいずれも主要駅やインターチェンジから遠く不便な立地だった。。[[1994年]]に所有者が宿泊施設「大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター」を開業{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。[[筋肉痛]]、[[関節痛]]、[[五十肩]]、[[運動麻痺]]などに効能がある{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=大鷹の湯 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}。又[[重金属|重金属類]]が検出されない稀有な温泉であり、[[酸化還元電位]]の低さも日本トップレベルとされる{{Cite web |title=古代ソマチッド温泉との出逢い – 天下泰平 |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=tenkataihei.com |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 === 杜の湯 === 「杜の湯」は[[2018年]]に「那須マロニエホテル」のオープンに合わせ開削された{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。全国的に珍しい[[モール泉]]であり、また炭酸水イオンの多さから「美人の湯」を謳っているほか、「大鷹の湯」と同じ病にも効能がある。 == 施設 == [[温泉街]]は前述の宿泊施設2軒のみである。また大鷹の湯は大人800円（平日）、マロニエホテルは大人600円で[[日帰り入浴|立ち寄り湯]]が可能である。 == アクセス == [[西那須野駅]]・[[那須塩原駅]]から[[那須塩原市営バス#西那須野線|「ゆーバス」西那須野線]]で「井口北」（大鷹の湯）または「[[国際医療福祉大学病院|国際医療福祉大学病院前]]」（マロニエホテル）下車{{Cite web |title=バスルート - 全国バス停・路線マップ |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[日本の温泉地一覧]] * [[千本松牧場]]（近隣の温泉施設） {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}}{{DEFAULTSORT:にしなすのおんせん}} [[Category:栃木県の温泉]] [[Category:日本の温泉地]] [[Category:那須塩原市の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:那須塩原市の地理]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[西那須野温泉]] to [[Nishinasuno Onsen]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 西那須野温泉 |画像 = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント =周辺の航空写真。中央やや上にあるのが大鷹の湯、中央やや左下にあるのがマロニエホテル。 |所在地 = 栃木県那須塩原市井口548-350(大鷹の湯) 栃木県那須塩原市井口546-1(杜の湯) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = [[東北自動車道]][[西那須野塩原IC]]から道程3.2㎞ |泉質 = 大鷹の湯:ナトリウム塩化物 炭酸水素塩泉
杜の湯:単純温泉 |泉温 =約40℃(いずれも高温泉) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 =いずれも弱アルカリ性 |浸透圧の分類 =いずれも低張性 |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = [[那須温泉郷]]・[[塩原温泉郷]]には属さない。 }} '''西那須野温泉'''（にしなすのおんせん）とは、[[栃木県]][[那須塩原市]]にある[[温泉]]である。[[西那須野駅]]北西3.7㎞に所在する。'''大鷹の湯'''{{Cite web |title=西那須温泉 - 温泉の歴史ジャパン |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}}、'''杜の湯'''{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル公式サイト｜客室の他、レストラン、温泉を完備した新スタイルのビジネスホテル |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}の2つの源泉が用いられている。 == 概要 == === 大鷹の湯 === 「大鷹の湯」は[[1983年]]に開削された比較的新しい温泉以前から[[那須|那須地方]]は温泉地として有名だったが、主要温泉地である[[塩原温泉郷|塩原]]、[[那須温泉郷|那須湯本]]、[[馬頭温泉郷|馬頭]]はいずれも主要駅やインターチェンジから遠く不便な立地だった。。[[1994年]]に所有者が宿泊施設「大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター」を開業{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=大鷹の湯 縄文大鷹リトリートセンター · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４８−３５０ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。[[筋肉痛]]、[[関節痛]]、[[五十肩]]、[[運動麻痺]]などに効能がある{{Cite web |title=大鷹の湯 |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=大鷹の湯 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}。又[[重金属|重金属類]]が検出されない稀有な温泉であり、[[酸化還元電位]]の低さも日本トップレベルとされる{{Cite web |title=古代ソマチッド温泉との出逢い – 天下泰平 |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=tenkataihei.com |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 === 杜の湯 === 「杜の湯」は[[2018年]]に「那須マロニエホテル」のオープンに合わせ開削された{{Cite web |title=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=那須マロニエホテル · 日本、〒329-2763 栃木県那須塩原市井口５４６−１ |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}。全国的に珍しい[[モール泉]]であり、また炭酸水イオンの多さから「美人の湯」を謳っているほか、「大鷹の湯」と同じ病にも効能がある。 == 施設 == [[温泉街]]は前述の宿泊施設2軒のみである。また大鷹の湯は大人800円（平日）、マロニエホテルは大人600円で[[日帰り入浴|立ち寄り湯]]が可能である。 == アクセス == [[西那須野駅]]・[[那須塩原駅]]から[[那須塩原市営バス#西那須野線|「ゆーバス」西那須野線]]で「井口北」（大鷹の湯）または「[[国際医療福祉大学病院|国際医療福祉大学病院前]]」（マロニエホテル）下車{{Cite web |title=バスルート - 全国バス停・路線マップ |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[日本の温泉地一覧]] * [[千本松牧場]]（近隣の温泉施設） {{温泉}}{{Onsen-stub}}{{DEFAULTSORT:にしなすのおんせん}} [[Category:栃木県の温泉]] [[Category:日本の温泉地]] [[Category:那須塩原市の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:那須塩原市の地理]]

{{infobox Onsen |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |image = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Brine spring|ja|塩化物泉|1=Brine spring|1=Brine spring}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉|1=Bicarbonate springs}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |External links = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉|1=Onsen|1=Onsen}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983rd year}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nishinasuno Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|西那須野温泉|version=104592540|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{infobox Onsen |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |image = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC|12=draft}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Brine spring|ja|塩化物泉|1=Brine spring|1=Brine spring|12=draft}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉|1=Bicarbonate springs|12=draft}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=draft}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |External links = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷|12=draft}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|12=draft}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉|1=Onsen|1=Onsen|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市|12=draft}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983rd year|12=draft}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷|12=draft}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year|12=draft}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|12=draft}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|12=draft}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|12=draft}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|12=draft}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|12=draft}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|12=draft}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year|12=draft}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring|12=draft}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|12=draft}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|12=draft}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|12=draft}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|12=draft}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|12=draft}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|12=draft}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|12=draft}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| }} {{translated page|ja|西那須野温泉|version=104592540|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nishinasuno Onsen}}

{{infobox Onsen |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |image = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC|12=draft}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Brine spring|ja|塩化物泉|1=Brine spring|1=Brine spring|12=draft}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉|1=Bicarbonate springs|12=draft}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=draft}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |External links = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷|12=draft}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|12=draft}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉|1=Onsen|1=Onsen|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市|12=draft}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983rd year|12=draft}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷|12=draft}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year|12=draft}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|12=draft}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|12=draft}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|12=draft}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|12=draft}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|12=draft}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|12=draft}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year|12=draft}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring|12=draft}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|12=draft}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|12=draft}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|12=draft}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|12=draft}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|12=draft}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|12=draft}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|12=draft}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|西那須野温泉|version=104592540|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nishinasuno Onsen}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]]

In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year|qq=draft}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|qq=draft}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|qq=draft}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|qq=draft}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|qq=draft}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|qq=draft}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|qq=draft}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year|qq=draft}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring|qq=draft}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|qq=draft}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|qq=draft}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|qq=draft}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|qq=draft}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|qq=draft}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|qq=draft}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|西那須野温泉|version=104592540|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nishinasuno Onsen}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Onsen |名称 = Nishinasuno Onsen
NISHINASUNO ONSEN |image = CKT20221-C15-10.jpg |コメント = Aerial photo of the surrounding area. The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道|qq=draft}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC|qq=draft}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Brine spring|ja|塩化物泉|1=Brine spring|1=Brine spring|qq=draft}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉|1=Bicarbonate springs|qq=draft}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|qq=draft}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |External links = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷|qq=draft}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|qq=draft}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉|1=Onsen|1=Onsen|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市|qq=draft}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983rd year|qq=draft}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷|qq=draft}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year|qq=draft}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|qq=draft}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|qq=draft}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|qq=draft}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|qq=draft}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|qq=draft}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|qq=draft}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year|qq=draft}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring|qq=draft}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|qq=draft}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|qq=draft}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|qq=draft}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|qq=draft}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|qq=draft}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|qq=draft}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|西那須野温泉|version=104592540|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nishinasuno Onsen}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]]

In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year|qq=draft}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|qq=draft}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|qq=draft}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|qq=draft}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|qq=draft}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|qq=draft}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|qq=draft}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year|qq=draft}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot spring|qq=draft}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|2=ja|3=温泉街|4=fr|5=Station thermale|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|qq=draft}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|qq=draft}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|qq=draft}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|qq=draft}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|qq=draft}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|qq=draft}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|西那須野温泉|version=104592540|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:温泉街]] [[Category:Moor hot spring]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]]

Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |External links = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu Onsen|qq=}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiobara Onsen|qq=}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉|1=Onsen|1=Onsen|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen|qq=}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu-Shiobara|qq=}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983rd year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1983|qq=}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiobara Onsen|qq=}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|qq=}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bato Onsen|qq=}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1994|qq=}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/muscle pain|qq=}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/joint pain|qq=}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/frozen shoulder|qq=}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/paralysis|qq=}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/heavy metals|qq=}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/oxidation-reduction potential|qq=}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2018|qq=}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|2=ja|3=温泉街|4=fr|5=Station thermale|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/spa town|13=User:Immanuelle/Spa town|qq=}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishinasuno Station|qq=}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasushiobara Station|qq=}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yū-Bus|qq=}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|qq=}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of hot spring areas in Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/List of hot springs in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbonmatsu Ranch|qq=}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|西那須野温泉|version=104592540|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Moor hot springs]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]]

In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1994|qq=}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/muscle pain|qq=}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/joint pain|qq=}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/frozen shoulder|qq=}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/paralysis|qq=}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/heavy metals|qq=}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/oxidation-reduction potential|qq=}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2018|qq=}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|2=ja|3=温泉街|4=fr|5=Station thermale|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/spa town|13=User:Immanuelle/Spa town|qq=}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishinasuno Station|qq=}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasushiobara Station|qq=}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yū-Bus|qq=}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|qq=}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of hot spring areas in Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/List of hot springs in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbonmatsu Ranch|qq=}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|西那須野温泉|version=104592540|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Moor hot springs]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]]

The central upper part is Ōtaka no Yu, and the central lower-left part is the Marronnier Hotel. |所在地 = Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 548-350 (Ōtaka no Yu) Tochigi Prefecture, Nasu-Shiobara City, Iguchi 546-1 (Mori no Yu) |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 54|緯度秒 = 48 |経度度 = 139|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 6 |交通 = {{ill|Tōhoku Expressway|ja|東北自動車道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōhoku Expressway|qq=}} {{ill|Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|ja|西那須野塩原IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishinasuno-Shiobara IC|qq=}}, 3.2 km by road |泉質 = Ōtaka no Yu: Sodium chloride bicarbonate spring ({{ill|Brine spring|ja|塩化物泉|1=Brine spring|1=Brine spring|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Brine spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Brine spring|qq=}}), {{ill|Bicarbonate spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉|1=Bicarbonate springs|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate springs|qq=}}
Mori no Yu: {{ill|Simple spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} |泉温 = Approximately 40°C (both are high-temperature springs) |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = Both weakly alkaline |浸透圧の分類 = Both hypotonic |温泉施設数 = |宿泊施設数 = 2 |年間浴客数 = |統計年 = |出典 = |External links = |特記事項 = Not part of {{ill|Nasu Onsen|ja|那須温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu Onsen|qq=}} or {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiobara Onsen|qq=}}. }} '''Nishinasuno Onsen''' (西那須野温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉|1=Onsen|1=Onsen|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen|qq=}} located in {{ill|Nasu-Shiobara|ja|那須塩原市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu-Shiobara|qq=}}, Tochigi Prefecture. It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in {{ill|1983|ja|1983年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1983|qq=}}The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiobara Onsen|qq=}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|qq=}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bato Onsen|qq=}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges.. In {{ill|1994|ja|1994年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1994|qq=}}, the owner opened a lodging facility named "Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Retreat Center"{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu Jōmon Ōtaka Retreat Center |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%81%AE%E6%B9%AF+%E7%B8%84%E6%96%87%E5%A4%A7%E9%B7%B9%E3%83%AA%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%E3%82%BB%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC/@36.9146184,139.9636437,1653m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f811c00000000:0x98bb776450e72050!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9158575!4d139.9704627!16s/g/1vg_7d6g?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is effective for {{ill|muscle pain|ja|筋肉痛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/muscle pain|qq=}}, {{ill|joint pain|ja|関節痛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/joint pain|qq=}}, {{ill|frozen shoulder|ja|五十肩|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/frozen shoulder|qq=}}, {{ill|paralysis|ja|運動麻痺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/paralysis|qq=}}, and other conditions{{Cite web |title=Ōtaka no Yu |url=https://www.ootakanoyu.com/ryokan/ |website=Ōtaka no Yu |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}. The spring is notable for the absence of {{ill|heavy metals|ja|重金属|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/heavy metals|qq=}} and its exceptionally low {{ill|oxidation-reduction potential|ja|酸化還元電位|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/oxidation-reduction potential|qq=}}, one of the lowest in Japan{{Cite web |title=Encountering Ancient Somatid Hot Springs |url=https://tenkataihei.com/?p=4878 |website=Tenkataihei |access-date=2024-06-24}}. === Mori no Yu === Mori no Yu was developed in {{ill|2018|ja|2018年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2018|qq=}} alongside the opening of the Nasu Marronnier Hotel{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel |url=https://www.google.co.jp/maps/place/%E9%82%A3%E9%A0%88%E3%83%9E%E3%83%AD%E3%83%8B%E3%82%A8%E3%83%9B%E3%83%86%E3%83%AB/@36.9129538,139.9684755,1656m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m9!3m8!1s0x601f8165a946692d:0x98cc5deba1564e01!5m2!4m1!1i2!8m2!3d36.9131197!4d139.9691285!16s/g/11f9yhwv_9?entry=ttu |website=Google Maps |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja-US}}. It is a rare {{ill|moor spring|ja|モール泉|1=Moor hot springs|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/moor spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Moor hot springs|qq=}} in Japan, earning the nickname "Bijin no Yu" (The Spring of Beauty) for its high bicarbonate ion content. It is also effective for the same conditions as Ōtaka no Yu. == Facilities == The {{ill|spa town|lt=onsen town|ja|温泉街|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|2=ja|3=温泉街|4=fr|5=Station thermale|1=Spa town|lt=Onsen town|1=spa town|lt=Onsen town|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/spa town|13=User:Immanuelle/Spa town|qq=}} consists of only the two lodging facilities mentioned above. Day-use bathing is available at Ōtaka no Yu for ¥800 (weekdays) and at Marronnier Hotel for ¥600. == Access == From {{ill|Nishinasuno Station|ja|西那須野駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishinasuno Station|qq=}} or {{ill|Nasushiobara Station|ja|那須塩原駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasushiobara Station|qq=}}, take the {{ill|Yū-Bus|ja|那須塩原市営バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yū-Bus|qq=}} Nishinasuno Line to "Iguchi-kita" (Ōtaka no Yu) or "{{ill|International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|ja|国際医療福祉大学病院前|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/International University of Health and Welfare Hospital|qq=}}" (Marronnier Hotel){{Cite web |title=Bus Routes - Nationwide Bus Stop & Route Map |url=https://bus-routes.net/ |website=bus-routes.net |access-date=2024-06-24}}. == Notes == === Note === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of hot spring areas in Japan|ja|日本の温泉地一覧|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|1=List of hot springs in Japan|2=ja|3=日本の温泉地一覧|4=zh|5=日本溫泉列表|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of hot spring areas in Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/List of hot springs in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|Senbonmatsu Ranch|ja|千本松牧場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbonmatsu Ranch|qq=}} (nearby hot spring facility) {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|西那須野温泉|version=104592540|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Hot springs in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Hot spring areas in Japan]] [[Category:Requests for images in Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Geography of Nasu-Shiobara]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Moor hot springs]] }} [[sn:Nishinasuno Onsen]] [[ja:西那須野温泉]] [[en:Nishinasuno Onsen]]

It is situated 3.7 km northwest of Nishinasuno Station. Two sources, '''Ōtaka no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nishinasu Onsen - History of Japanese Onsen |url=https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/,%20https://www.onsen-history.com/1713/ |website=www.onsen-history.com |date=2019-08-30 |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja |last=admin}} and '''Mori no Yu'''{{Cite web |title=Nasu Marronnier Hotel Official Site |url=https://nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp/ |website=nasu-marronnier-hotel.jp |access-date=2024-06-24 |language=ja}}, are used. == Overview == === Ōtaka no Yu === Ōtaka no Yu is a relatively new hot spring developed in [[:en:1983|1983]]The Nasu region has been famous for hot springs for a long time, but major hot spring areas such as {{ill|Shiobara Onsen|ja|塩原温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiobara Onsen|qq=}}, {{ill|Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|ja|那須湯本|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu-Yumoto Onsen|qq=}}, and {{ill|Bato Onsen|ja|馬頭温泉郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bato Onsen|qq=}} are all inconveniently located far from major stations or interchanges..
